name: WFBE_NEURODEF_FORTIF_HESCO_LINE

Deliberately a LONGER, materially-efficient perimeter run vs the legacy WFBE_NEURODEF_WALL_STRAIGHT (same class, 4 panels at a heavy 5 m pitch = only ~25 m): this is the 'larger assets' half of the WDDM redo. Passive, z=0, all dir 0.
